entities.name: Monitor
entities.context: A tool that wakes up and handles meeting processing

entities.name: Processor
entities.context: A tool that processes meetings with a lookahead feature

entities.name: Meeting A
entities.context: An urgent meeting scheduled for October 15

entities.name: Meeting B
entities.context: A normal meeting scheduled for October 16

relationships.context: The Monitor calls the Processor to manage meetings
Processor identifies Meeting A as an urgent meeting
Processor identifies Meeting B as a normal meeting
Monitor detects that Meeting A is urgent
Monitor adds Meeting B to the digest queue
